title: Ord Lithone

'''Ord Lithone''' was an [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] that served as a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|outpost]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]]. [[Millennium/Legends|Millennia]] later, it hosted a [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]] [[Factory/Legends|factory]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], citing the increased Republic regulations on [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] manufacture and sales as a reason, Baktoid announced the closure of several of its factories, including that on Ord Lithone.

==Description==
Ord Lithone was a terrestrial<ref name="HNN" /> [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord}} states that the term "[[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]]" and the abbreviation "Ord" applied to certain [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].</ref> located in the [[Ord Lithone system/Legends|Ord Lithone system]], a part of the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> A [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] linked it to the [[Chalenor system|Chalenor]] and [[Gyrica system/Legends|Gyrica systems]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==History==
Ord Lithone served as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] [[Colonist/Legends|outpost]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Pius Dea Era]], a period of [[Time/Legends|time]] that lasted between approximately [[12,000 BBY/Legends|12,000 BBY]] and [[11,000 BBY]].<ref name="EGTW" /> By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|business/1337_1.html|Baktoid Closes Down Five More Plants}} is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:3:7," which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]], a manufacturer of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and vehicles<ref name="HNN" /> that was a subsidiary of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]],<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> maintained a [[Factory/Legends|factory]] on Ord Lithone.<ref name="HNN" /> In the wake of its unsuccessful [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invasion]] of<ref name="NEGWT" /> the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> in a calculated move the Trade Federation had<ref name="NEGWT" /> Baktoid Armor Workshop announce the closure of several of its manufacturing plants in Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]], including on Ord Lithone, by the end of the [[Standard month/Legends|month]] 13:3—a decision that would result in a layoff of an estimated 12.5 million employees of factories in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] and the Inner Rim.<ref name="HNN" />

[[File:OrdLithone-HNN.png|thumb|right|300px|Surplus battle droids at a Baktoid Armor Workshop factory on Ord Lithone]]
The announcement was reported in the 13:3:7 issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]], with the report including an image depicting surplus [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] at the plant of Ord Lithone. Baktoid Armor Workshop cited the Republic's increased regulation on battle [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacture and sales as the reason for the closure;<ref name="HNN" /> however, in reality the company secretly moved its factories to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] beyond the Republic's jurisdiction.<ref name="DB">{{DB|location|geonosisfoundry|Geonosis droid factory}}</ref> Ord Lithone fell within the borders of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ord Lithone was introduced in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 46|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #46]], an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|representation]] of the [[in-universe]] HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> that was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]], illustrated by [[Joe Corroney]],<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published by [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ord Lithone [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square L-8.<ref name="TEA" />
